creator: rhurlin@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Tilman Keskinoz from comment #4)
> Assigining to devel/ncurses maintainer, because
> I think this is a problem of the ncurses port.

I just tried again to build sysutils/libcdio on recent HEAD with latest ports updates and now it works for me without the LDFLAGS patch.

Maybe, this is ok now also for 10.x, 9.x and 8.x?
